description_long: This object consists of two large, rugged combat tactical vehicles, each with a boxy, armored body and high ground clearance. The vehicles feature reinforced bumpers, prominent wheel arches, and visible spare tires mounted on the rear doors. One vehicle is painted in a matte black finish, while the other is in a light tan color, both with dark-tinted windows and multiple roof-mounted fixtures such as lights and possible antennae. The doors and panels are angular, suggesting heavy armor, and the vehicles have robust, all-terrain tires with deep treads. The front grilles are wide and metallic, and the side mirrors are large for enhanced visibility. No visible weapon mounts, military markings, or camouflage patterns are present, giving the vehicles a utilitarian, tactical appearance.
description: Pair of large, armored combat tactical vehicles in black and tan, with reinforced bodies, spare rear tires, and all-terrain wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grilles, angular hoods, and roof-mounted fixtures of both vehicles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy profiles, large wheel arches, and side doors with angular armor panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spare tires mounted on the back doors and the robust rear bumpers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the length of the vehicles, side windows, and the contrast between the black and tan finishes.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular panels on all sides, including reinforced doors and bumpers; no visible modular or reactive features.
attribute_tire_type: Four large, all-terrain tires per vehicle with deep, off-road tread patterns and reinforced sidewalls; visible spare tire mounted on rear.
